data.content: Approved shipment review: searchable OpenCode model picker and hardened prefix stripping are present on main (commit 0a7d8ef5ce7d). Required implementation commits are tagged with commit: short hashes (4f82dfa3d3b7, 64bb470ed772, 0a7d8ef5ce7d). GitHub Actions workflows (CI, Coverage Badge, Changesets) completed successfully for shipped commits; no invariant violations or regression indicators found.
